event.desc: Tanmay joining for his MS Thesis.
Shuchita giving research talk at Ashoka University.
Shreyas joined for his MS Thesis.
Kartik joined as a Project Assistant in the Indo-German DBT project.
Rajni gave talk at International Soft Matter Conference, Spain, bagged ANRF travel funding.
Rahul defended his MS Thesis, congratulations to him.
Shuchita Mishra joined for her PhD.
